title: node:test, Supertest, Contracts, Properties, Fuzzing, and Fault Injection · Contract Lens: Fault Time Load Leak Gates
summary: Tests call live dependencies, assert only status 200, share mutable state, never vary malformed inputs, and mistake mocks or coverage for behavioral proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts fault time load leak gates increment in layered deterministic server verification matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inject aborts, timeouts, pool exhaustion, ambiguous commits, proxy faults, slow streams, clock shifts, load, and resource leaks with invariant and recovery gates.
Generate bounded valid and invalid values for parsers, routes, canonicalization, authorization, pagination, and idempotency while shrinking reproducible counterexamples.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
